title: decision
description: One decision record (ADR). One file per direction change, named decisions/NNNN-slug.json, numbered and fixed once accepted. Add a record only when direction changes — a choice a future session shouldn't silently reverse. Routine progress needs no ADR.

number.description: ADR number; matches the NNNN prefix in the filename.

supersedes.description: ADR number this decision supersedes, or null. When set, also set `supersededBy` on that older record and flip its status to 'Superseded'.

supersededBy.description: ADR number that superseded this one, or null. Set on the OLD record when a newer one replaces it.

context.description: The situation and the forces in tension. What prompted this decision. Keep it specific and falsifiable. If it reverses an earlier call, name it.

decision.description: The choice, stated plainly. What we will do — and, where it sharpens the decision, what we will NOT do.

consequences.description: What follows: trade-offs accepted, what this enables, what it forecloses.

staysTrue.description: The things this decision does NOT change — guardrails and prior commitments that still hold. Optional but useful.
